title: NOT x LIKE triggers "too many nested operators"
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(20), age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
SELECT * FROM bar WHERE name NOT LIKE 'A%';
SELECT * FROM bar WHERE NOT (age IS NULL OR name LIKE 'B%') AND id < 3;
key_bug_features: NOT x LIKE with too many nested operators
